dict.string: The app uses standard encryption algorithms (secp256k1 ECIES with AES-256-GCM and HKDF-SHA256) that are accepted by international standards bodies (IETF, IEEE). These algorithms are implemented using Apple's standard CryptoKit framework and do not require export compliance documentation.

BrightNexus mediates location access for command-line tools that ask for it through the BrightLink protocol. Each requesting tool is named in a modal prompt; you grant or deny access per-tool. No location data leaves this device.

BrightNexus mediates location access for command-line tools that ask for it through the BrightLink protocol. Each requesting tool is named in a modal prompt; you grant or deny access per-tool. No location data leaves this device.
